_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Advocate for adequate funding for cyber training resources, to include both internal and industry-provided courses, instructors, and related materials.
reference_document_element_description: Design, develop, and deliver data and AI training programs for defined organizational audiences, including needs assessment, curriculum development, delivery execution, and effectiveness measurement.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-006 (OP, cosine: 0.375), OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.371).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.299). Shared vocabulary: [training]. DCWF-only terms [adequate, advocate, courses, cyber, funding, include] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, audiences, curriculum, data, defined] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.877, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.1%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Advocate for adequate funding for cyber training resources, to include both inte" and "Design, develop, and deliver data and AI training programs for defined organizat". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.409 > STS 0.299 (gap +0.110). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [training] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [training]. DCWF-only: [adequate, advocate, courses, cyber, funding, include]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, audiences, curriculum, data, defined].
